info.name: Lodge Management System
info.description:
API collection for the Lodge Management System. Multi-tenant backend with three user classes: Staff (org-scoped), Backoffice (platform admins), and Guests (standalone).

Base URL: {{base_url}}

**Staff flow:** Login → token auto-saved → all staff requests use it.
**Backoffice flow:** Use backoffice_token variable.
**Guest flow:** Use guest_token variable.

variable.description: Staff JWT — auto-set by Login test script
Backoffice JWT — auto-set by Backoffice Login test script
Guest JWT — auto-set by Guest Login test script
Organization UUID — auto-set by Staff Login test script

request.description: Public health check. Returns 200 OK when the server is running.

Staff login. If the email belongs to users in multiple orgs, the response returns `requires_org_selection: true` with an `organizations` array — re-send with `org_id` to complete login.

On success: saves `token` and `org_id` collection variables automatically.

**Multi-org example body:**
```json
{
  "email": "shared@example.com",
  "password": "...",
  "org_id": "<uuid>"
}
```
Step 2 of the multi-org login flow. Send the `org_id` chosen from the organizations list returned in step 1.
Returns the currently authenticated staff user decoded from the JWT.
JWT is stateless — logout is handled client-side by discarding the token.
Change the authenticated staff user's own password.
Returns a randomly generated password that satisfies the active password policy.
Returns the authenticated user's profile.
Create a new staff user scoped to the caller's org (derived from JWT). Requires admin role. A welcome email with credentials is sent to the user.

query.description: Filter by name or email (partial match)

request.description: Paginated list of users in the caller's org only. Org is derived from JWT.
Get a single staff user by UUID.
Update a user's full_name, email, role, status, or password. All fields optional. Include `password` only when resetting.
Permanently delete a user. Scoped to caller's org — cannot delete users from other orgs.
Lock a user account until an admin explicitly unlocks it.
Unlock a locked account and reset their failed login attempt counter.
Assign a role by UUID. Prefer PUT /users/{id} with `role` name string for the simpler approach.
Generate a temporary password and send it to the user's email. Forces password change on next login.
Paginated list of rooms in the caller's org.
Rooms with no confirmed/checked_in bookings in the given date range, scoped to caller's org.
Get a single room by UUID, scoped to caller's org.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Room 101",
  "type": "double",
  "capacity": 2,
  "price_per_night": 250.00,
  "amenities": ["WiFi", "Air Conditioning", "En-suite Bathroom"],
  "description": "Spacious double room with garden view"
}

request.description: Create a new room in the caller's org. Requires admin or manager. Saves returned `id` to `room_id`.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Room 101",
  "type": "double",
  "capacity": 2,
  "price_per_night": 280.00,
  "amenities": ["WiFi", "Air Conditioning", "En-suite Bathroom", "Mini Bar"],
  "description": "Spacious double room with garden view and mini bar",
  "is_available": true
}

request.description: Update a room. Scoped to caller's org — cannot modify rooms from other orgs.
Toggle a room's availability. `false` = offline (maintenance), `true` = available.
Permanently delete a room. Scoped to caller's org.
List individual clients in the caller's org.
Get a single individual client. Scoped to caller's org.
Create a new individual client record in the caller's org.
Update an individual client. Scoped to caller's org.
Delete an individual client. Scoped to caller's org.

query.description: Search by company name or email

request.description: List corporate clients in the caller's org.
Get a single corporate client. Scoped to caller's org.
Create a new corporate client record in the caller's org.
Update a corporate client. Scoped to caller's org.
Delete a corporate client. Scoped to caller's org.
Paginated list of all bookings in the caller's org.
Get a single booking. Scoped to caller's org.
Create a booking in the caller's org. Validates room availability, capacity, and date range. Triggers the booking approval workflow automatically.
Update a booking's dates, guests, or special requests. Only allowed while pending.

Valid transitions:
- pending → confirmed (locks room)
- pending → cancelled (frees room)
- confirmed → checked_in
- confirmed → cancelled (frees room)
- checked_in → checked_out (frees room, auto-generates invoice)
Permanently delete a booking. Not allowed when checked_in. Scoped to caller's org.
Paginated list of menus in the caller's org. Each menu includes its items.
Get a single menu with all its items. Scoped to caller's org.
Create a menu. Requires admin or manager. Saves returned `id` to `menu_id`.
Update a menu's name, description, or active status.
Delete a menu and all its items (CASCADE). Scoped to caller's org.
Add an item to a menu. Price is set here and snapshotted on orders. Saves returned `id` to `menu_item_id`.
Update a menu item's name, description, price, or availability. Price changes only affect future orders — past orders retain their snapshotted price.
Delete a menu item. Will fail if the item is referenced by existing order_items (RESTRICT).
Paginated list of all orders in the caller's org.
Get a single order with all its items. Scoped to caller's org.

Place an order for a confirmed or checked-in booking. Prices are snapshotted at order time. The booking's invoice is updated immediately with a Food & Beverage line item. Saves returned `id` to `order_id`.
Place an order for a walk-in customer with no booking. No invoice is updated. Saves returned `id` to `order_id`.
Append more items to an existing order (e.g. second round of drinks). The booking's invoice is updated immediately with an additional line item.
Paginated list of invoices in the caller's org.
Get a single invoice. Scoped to caller's org.
Fetch the invoice for a given booking. Scoped to caller's org.

Update invoice status. Valid transitions:
- draft → issued
- draft → cancelled
- issued → paid (include paid_date)
- issued → overdue
- issued → cancelled
- overdue → paid
- overdue → cancelled
Returns all data needed for the staff dashboard, scoped to caller's org: stat cards, room summary, revenue by month, reservations by day, recent bookings.
Get the current password policy configuration.
Update the password policy. All fields optional.
Returns supported workflow type constants (e.g. BOOKING_APPROVAL).
Create a new workflow template. `org_id` is taken from the caller's JWT — not required in the body. Saves returned `id` to `workflow_id`.
List all active workflow templates in the caller's org.
Get a workflow template. Scoped to caller's org — returns 404 for workflows from other orgs.
Returns the complete workflow — steps and transitions in one response.
Update a workflow's name, description, or active status. Scoped to caller's org.
Soft-delete: marks the workflow as inactive. Scoped to caller's org.
Permanently delete a workflow and all its steps/transitions. Scoped to caller's org.
Add a step to a workflow. The workflow must belong to the caller's org. Saves returned `id` to `step_id`.
Get a single workflow step.

item.name: Steps — Get All Steps for Workflow

request.description: List all steps for a workflow, ordered by step_order.
Update a workflow step.
Delete a workflow step.
List all transitions that originate from this step.
Define a valid transition between two steps. The workflow must belong to caller's org. Saves returned `id` to `transition_id`.
List all transitions for a workflow.
Update a workflow transition.
Delete a workflow transition.
Get all workflow tasks assigned to the authenticated user, scoped to their org.
Shortcut — pending tasks only for the authenticated user.
Get full details of a specific assigned task, including the workflow instance and history.
Start a new workflow instance. `org_id` is taken from the caller's JWT. Saves returned `id` to `instance_id`.
Approve or reject a workflow instance. `action` must be `"approve"` or `"reject"` — any other value returns 400. Only instances belonging to the caller's org can be actioned.
Find the workflow instance for a business entity (e.g. a booking UUID). Scoped to caller's org.
Get the full audit trail of a workflow instance. Returns 404 if the instance doesn't belong to the caller's org.
Platform-level admin login. Hits the `backoffice_users` table — no org required. Saves token to `backoffice_token` variable.
Returns the currently authenticated backoffice user.
Change the backoffice user's own password.
List all backoffice (platform admin) users.
Create a new backoffice user. Saves returned `id` to `backoffice_user_id`.
Get a single backoffice user.
Update a backoffice user's details.
Delete a backoffice user.
Generate and email a temporary password to a backoffice user.
Lock a backoffice user account.
Unlock a backoffice user account.
List all organizations (lodges) on the platform.
Create a new lodge organization and its first admin user in a single transaction. The admin's password is auto-generated and emailed to them. Saves returned `org_id` to variable.
Get a single organization by UUID.
Update an organization's details.
Delete an organization. Use with caution.
Public endpoint. Returns a paginated list of active lodges (organizations) on the platform. Use the returned `id` as the lodge/org scope when browsing rooms or making bookings.
Public endpoint. Creates a guest account and linked individual profile in one transaction. Returns a JWT so the guest is logged in immediately. Saves token to `guest_token`.
Guest login. Hits the `guests` table — separate from staff login. Saves token to `guest_token`.
Public endpoint. Generates a new random password and emails it to the guest. Always returns 200 regardless of whether the email exists to avoid leaking account information.
Returns the authenticated guest's account and linked individual profile.
Update the guest's own profile. Email cannot be changed here.

Create a booking as a guest. `client_id` and org are resolved automatically from the JWT and the room's `org_id`. A booking approval workflow is triggered automatically. Food orders are placed separately via staff after check-in. Saves returned `id` to `guest_booking_id`.
Returns a paginated list of the authenticated guest's own bookings only.
Get a single booking. Returns 403 if the booking belongs to a different guest.
Cancel the guest's own booking. Only allowed when status is pending or confirmed.

query.description: Optional — filter by lodge UUID. Omit to return menus from all orgs.

request.description: Public endpoint. Returns active menus with their available items. Pass `org_id` to filter by a specific lodge.
Submit a review after check-out. Booking must have status `checked_out` and belong to the authenticated guest. One review per booking. Scores are 0–5.
Public endpoint. Returns aggregate ratings across all reviews: average facilities, cleanliness, services, comfort, location, and overall score.
